channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Padres muster no offense to support Yu Darvish's inspired pitching in NLDS loss to Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Yu Darvish tapped the “PS” patch on his uniform and then went to work on the way to an inspired performance. Yet, try as he might, Darvish’s stellar outing in memory of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler was not enough to overcome the Los Angeles Dodgers on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG PADILLA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: All aboard! Mets and Yankees only 2 stops away from first Subway Series in 24 years
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Two stops away from a Subway Series. When the New York Yankees advanced to the American League Championship Series on Thursday night, that put both Big Apple teams in baseball's final four for the first time in 24 years.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Yamamoto outduels Darvish in historic matchup as Dodgers beat Padres 2-0 to reach NLCS
item.description: Yoshinobu Yamamoto outdueled Yu Darvish in a historic playoff matchup of Japanese-born starters, and the Los Angeles Dodgers got home runs from Kiké Hernández and Teoscar Hernández to beat the San Diego Padres 2-0 and advance to the National League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Padres eliminated from playoffs after loss to Dodgers in Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: The Padres playoff road has come to an end after losing to the Los Angeles Dodgers 2-0 in Game 5 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What is the story behind the iconic San Diego Chicken?
item.description: Fifty years ago, an iconic professional mascot emerged in San Diego, clad in bright orange and yellow feathers. For decades since, the San Diego Chicken has captivated fans with his comedic bits and sketches in various venues around the world.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Former Dodgers pitcher Trevor Bauer sues accuser, says she broke settlement terms
item.description: Trevor Bauer, the former Los Angeles Dodgers pitcher and Cy Young Award winner whose career was upended by sexual assault allegations is reportedly suing his accuser for violating their settlement agreement. According to a TMZ report on Friday, the 33-year-old L.A.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Todd Downing tasked with helping Aaron Rodgers and Jets' struggling offense after 'unique week'
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — Aaron Rodgers and the New York Jets' offense appeared on their way toward the efficient, high-scoring and productive force they fully expected they'd be this season. A lot has certainly changed in the last three weeks.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers will start Yamamoto against San Diego's Darvish in winner-take-all Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani will get his wish to see Los Angeles Dodgers teammate Yoshinobu Yamamoto face off against San Diego's Yu Darvish in Game 5 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giants WR Malik Nabers to miss 2nd straight game with a concussion
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Wide receiver Malik Nabers, the NFL's leader with 35 catches, remains in the concussion protocol and will miss his second consecutive game, Giants coach Brian Daboll announced before practice Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Deion Sanders rips TV executives for Colorado’s late matchup vs Kansas State: ‘Half of America is asleep’
item.description: Colorado coach Deion Sanders is coming off a bye week well-rested for Saturday's game against Kansas State, but a late kickoff has the former NFL star asking, "Who does that to us?"
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jaguars legend Maurice Jones-Drew explains how team can use London trip to 'springboard' into win streak
item.description: The Jacksonville Jaguars finally got their losing streak broken last week, but team legend Maurice Jones-Drew believes a win streak can begin in a very familiar place in London.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL officials' missed call during 49ers-Seahawks game bewilders fans
item.description: NFL officials puzzled fans and players alike on Thursday night over a missed call during a game between the Seattle Seahawks and San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lakers show off California Destiny City Edition uniforms, new-look court
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers are showing off some brand-new uniforms and a few changes to Crypto.com Arena court ahead of the 2024-25 NBA season. The California Destiny City Edition uniform incorporates a black and purple gradient and replaces the iconic Lakers lettering with Lake Show on the front.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Whittingham not ready to hand keys over to Wilson yet
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With so much uncertainty as to when Cam Rising will be able to return at quarterback for the Utah football team, is there a point when head coach Kyle Whittingham will move on from Rising and hand the keys to the offense over to freshman Isaac Wilson? "There is
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Padres urge fans to 'stay classy'
item.description: San Diego Padres management is asking fans to demonstrate good behavior as the contentious National League Division Series shifts from Dodger Stadium to Petco Park on Tuesday, tied at one game apiece.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Jets fire head coach Robert Saleh after a 2-3 start to the season, AP source says
item.description: The New York Jets have fired head coach Robert Saleh after the team's 2-3 start in his fourth season, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press. Saleh was 20-36 as coach of the Jets, who are trying to snap the NFL's longest active playoff drought at 13 seasons.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Verdugo's go-ahead single and acrobatic catch lift Yankees over Royals 6-5 in ALDS opener
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Verdugo hit a tiebreaking single in the seventh inning and saved at least one run with a sliding catch along the left-field line, boosting the New York Yankees over the Kansas City Royals 6-5 on Saturday night in their AL Division Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Who plays for the Los Angeles Clippers this year? Here's a breakdown of the roster
item.description: Yet another NBA offseason has come and gone, with some major free agent signings taking place and some big names being selected in this year’s draft.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Ludmila scores in third straight game as Chicago Red Stars down Houston Dash 2-0
item.description: Ludmila scored a goal and earned a penalty shot as the Chicago Red Stars beat the Houston Dash 2-0 on Friday night at Shell Energy Stadium. Ludmila headed in Mallory Pugh's free kick in the 8th minute to get things started. It was the third straight game she had scored a goal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
